relevant_files.summary: Defines 14 blind-box themes. Each theme has large, medium, small, hanging categories with 100 items each.
Defines optional item state prefixes. Some surface/light/color terms may conflict with image-difference constraints.
Tkinter UI and extraction logic. Current extraction uses category enable/count controls, history cooldown, and optional state prefix.
Documents single-line input syntax, category overrides, history semantics, and UI constraints.
Documents blind-box input syntax and extraction behavior.

existing_patterns.description: BLIND_BOXES is a static Python dictionary keyed by numeric box id.
UI exposes large, medium, small, hanging as independently enabled categories with spinbox counts.
Items are selected with seen-cycle and cooldown history, but no quality or suitability metadata.
Users can disable or adjust categories with terms such as 无大型物品 and 中型物品+1.

content_findings.finding: The current theme set is stylistically coherent but narrow.
content_findings.evidence: 14 themes skew toward warm home, craft, storage, decor, and light lifestyle scenes.

content_findings.finding: The large category is dominated by containers and storage objects.
content_findings.evidence: Keyword counting found about 93.4% of large items match container/storage characters.

content_findings.finding: The small category frequently becomes too tiny or abstract.
content_findings.evidence: About 49.9% of small items match mini/label/sample/card/button/clip-like terms.

content_findings.finding: The hanging category is conditional rather than generally applicable.
content_findings.evidence: About 60.4% of hanging items match hanging or support-dependent terms; about 57.4% are soft/deformable.

content_findings.finding: The medium category is comparatively healthier.
content_findings.evidence: It more often contains recognizable tools and independent objects.

architecture_constraints: Do not break the existing comma input syntax unless explicitly redesigning the UI.
Existing docs expect category labels 大型物品, 中型物品, 散落小型物品, 悬挂物品.
History keys currently include category keys; category migrations would need compatibility handling if implemented later.
This brainstorm session is read-only and does not modify source code.
